'''J'mesk Iman''' was a male [[Tamran]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the [[Tamran]] People circa [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]]. It is possible he was a supporter of the [[Diversity Alliance]], as he spoke in its defense in the New Republic Senate Chambers.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]'' {{1st}}
